name: The Legendary Fisherman III
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>伝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>説</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>のフィッシャーマン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>世</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "The Legendary Fisherman". When this card is Special Summoned: You can banish all monsters your opponent controls, also this card cannot attack this turn. Cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects, also unaffected by Spell/Trap effects. Once per turn: You can return as many of your opponent's banished cards as possible to their GY, and if you do, the first battle or effect damage your opponent takes this turn becomes doubled.
mnst_eff: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 "The Legendary Fisherman". When this card is Special Summoned: You can banish all monsters your opponent controls, also this card cannot attack this turn. Once per turn: You can return as many of your opponent's banished cards as possible to their GY, and if you do, the first battle or effect damage your opponent takes this turn becomes doubled.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Duels From the Deep

jp_sets.set: Duelist Pack: Duelists of the Abyss

action: Returns the opponent's banished cards to the Graveyard
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
